top_signals.title: US Futures Climb on Reports Peace Talks to Resume: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: US equity futures climbed after reports that the US and Iran stepped back from an escalation in hostilities that had threatened the fragile ceasefire underpinning peace talks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China's Zhipu is closing in on top U.S. AI models with Anthropic and OpenAI held back
top_signals.summary: Zhipu's GLM 5.2 shows the AI fight is shifting to who delivers the most intelligence per dollar, making open source suddenly a real contender.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bond giant Pimco flexes muscles with private placements push
top_signals.summary: Firm tries to capitalise on some borrowers’ need to raise cash as boundaries with public markets blur
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: They Looked Like They Were Getting Rich on Polymarket—but None of It Was Real - WSJ
top_signals.summary: They Looked Like They Were Getting Rich on Polymarket—but None of It Was Real  WSJ
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: QuidelOrtho looks to sell testing unit as PE circles healthcare companies
top_signals.summary: Diagnostic company’s shares are down 90% since its rapid antigen tests were the first to be approved for Covid-19

top_signals.title: Some renters say homeownership isn't part of their American Dream: Renting is 'really freeing for me'
top_signals.summary: Some no longer see renting as a temporary stop on the path to homeownership but rather a long-term lifestyle choice, reflecting a shift in the American Dream.
